title: Intensely Umami Korean Ovoli Mushroom Banchan
description: A low-calorie, crispy Korean dish featuring ovoli mushrooms, perfect for a date night, with intense umami flavor from yuzu cure.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together yuzu juice, soy sauce, garlic, ginger, sesame oil, brown sugar, and crushed black pepper to make the yuzu cure.
Add the sliced ovoli mushrooms to the bowl and toss to coat with the yuzu cure.
Let the mushrooms marinate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to penetrate.
Preheat a non-stick skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Remove the mushrooms from the marinade, letting any excess liquid drip off.
Add the mushrooms to the preheated skillet and cook until they are crispy and golden brown, about 5 minutes per side.
Transfer the cooked mushrooms to a plate and sprinkle with toasted sesame seeds and chopped green onions.
Serve the intensely umami Korean ovoli mushroom banchan hot, garnished with additional green onions if desired.
